news.headline: IonQ introduces its first quantum computer in Europe, IonQ Forte Enterprise, at the uptownBasel campus in Arlesheim, Switzerland. #AQ36.
news.summary: IonQ, a prominent player in quantum computing and networking, has disclosed the successful provision of IonQ Forte Enterprise to its inaugural European Innovation Center situated at the uptownBasel campus in Arlesheim, Switzerland. This achievement was realized in collaboration with QuantumBasel. The event is significant as it signifies the initial deployment of a datacenter-prepared quantum computer by IonQ outside the US. Additionally, it is the first commercial quantum system in Switzerland.

news.headline: RTX's Pratt & Whitney partners with Polish Air Force University to enhance cadet education on F100 and F135 engines.
news.summary: Pratt & Whitney, a subsidiary of RTX (NYSE: RTX), has announced a new collaboration with the Polish Air Force University in Rzeszów, Poland. The partnership involves focusing on the advanced F100 and F135 fighter engines. This initiative aims to provide cadets with opportunities to enhance their knowledge and skills regarding these cutting-edge jet engines. The letter of intent signed on December 5, 2024, underscores the commitment to fostering a deeper understanding of the technology behind these engines among future airmen.

news.headline: Blue Ridge Associates rebrands and launches OneBlueRidge.com, enhancing client experience. - Retirement plan admin solutions provider expanding services.
news.summary: A prominent company specializing in retirement plan administration solutions has recently introduced expanded services and improved client experiences through the launch of a new brand identity and digital platform. Headquartered in Charlottesville, Virginia, the rebranded Blue Ridge Associates aims to cater to retirement plan professionals with enhanced offerings. The transformation took place on December 5, 2024, marking a pivotal moment for the company's growth and evolution in the industry. This development is set to benefit a significant number of clients and stakeholders, reflecting the company's commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction.

news.headline: MetaOptics Technologies will showcase metalens-powered consumer electronics at CES 2025, Las Vegas from Jan 7-10, 2025.
news.summary: A tech company based in Singapore, MetaOptics Technologies Pte. Ltd., will be showcasing their latest innovations at CES 2025 in Las Vegas from January 7-10, 2025. The company will be highlighting their advancements in metalens-powered consumer electronics during the event.

news.headline: Leidos gets 3 DISA awards to advance IT transformation, migrate users to DoDNet. Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia on December 5, 2024, Leidos was granted three fresh contracts by the Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA). These awards mark the initiation of the subsequent stage of IT evolution, facilitating the relocation of an increased user base to the Department of Defense Network (DoDNet) within the Defense Enclave. The company, listed under the ticker symbol LDOS on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE), looks forward to advancing in its mission following the acquisition of these contracts.

news.headline: Ryvu Therapeutics starts POTAMI-61 Phase II study of RVU120 for myelofibrosis, with goal to assess safety and efficacy.
news.summary: The main aim of the research is to assess the safety and effectiveness of RVU120 in individuals suffering from myelofibrosis (MF), whether used alone or alongside ruxolitinib (RUX). This study was initiated following RVU120's positive results in the RIVER-51 Phase I trial involving patients with acute conditions. The study seeks to determine the potential benefits of RVU120 in treating myelofibrosis patients through both single-agent and combination therapy with RUX.

news.headline: SBVA wins "VC of the Year" at Korea VC Awards 2024 for exceptional investment performance.
news.summary: On December 4th, 2024, SBVA, formerly known as SoftBank Ventures Asia, was recognized at the 15th Korea Venture Capital Awards held in Seoul, South Korea, receiving the esteemed "VC of the Year" award. This accolade highlighted SBVA's remarkable investment performance and significant contributions to the industry.

news.headline: Stanley Black & Decker offers snow equipment tips for winter. Maker of DEWALT®, CRAFTSMAN®, Cub Cadet®.
news.summary: In New Britain, Connecticut on December 5, 2024, Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK), a prominent manufacturer of outdoor power equipment, is offering guidance for winter snow removal to property owners. They are providing tips and product suggestions from their well-known brands DEWALT®, CRAFTSMAN®, Cub Cadet®, among others.

news.headline: Trend Micro (TYO: 4704; TSE: 4704) attains FedRAMP® authorization, solidifying position as Zero Trust compliance leader.
news.summary: Global cybersecurity leader Trend Micro Incorporated (TYO: 4704; TSE: 4704) revealed its recent platform compliance milestone with Trend Vision One™, emphasizing its crucial role in enhancing security and meeting regulations for enterprises and governments worldwide. This accomplishment was announced on December 5, 2024, marking a significant step in providing advanced solutions for organizations to address their security and compliance needs effectively.

news.headline: Murphy Company Mechanical Contractors signs a 3-year agreement with Revizto for model-based coordination.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 5, 2024, Revizto, the top-rated Integrated Collaboration Platform for project workflows and communication, revealed a significant development. They secured a fresh three-year enterprise contract with Murphy Company Mechanical Contractors. This partnership signifies a commitment to leveraging Revizto's cutting-edge technology for enhancing organizational efficiency. This collaboration is poised to bring substantial advancements to Murphy Company, promising optimized workflows and streamlined communication processes over the next three years.

news.headline: OrthoPediatrics expands specialty bracing portfolio with 2 new products - OPSB Sensor System & MOVE-D™.
news.summary: In Warsaw, Indiana, on December 5, 2024, OrthoPediatrics Corp. revealed the expansion of its OrthoPediatrics Specialty Bracing (OPSB™) division by introducing two new products - the OPSB Sensor System and MOVE-D™. OrthoPediatrics, known for its dedication to pediatric orthopedics, made this announcement as part of its ongoing commitment to innovation in the field. The NASDAQ-listed company (Nasdaq: KIDS) aims to enhance its product line and cater to the unique needs of young orthopedic patients with these new additions.

news.headline: Field Medical's FieldForce™ Ablation System gets FDA TAP Pilot acceptance & Breakthrough Device Designation for Ventricular Tachycardia treatment. PFA system aims to transform care for those at risk of VT.
news.summary: A breakthrough in medical technology has been achieved with the creation of the initial contact force pulsed field ablation (PFA) system. This innovative system is set to transform the treatment landscape for the large population facing the threat of ventricular tachycardia (VT) mortality. Notably, the FDA has granted the TAP Pilot and Breakthrough Device Designation to this system, recognizing its potential to enhance care for the vast number of individuals at risk.

news.headline: Sensei Advisory wins PRWeek's 'Best Places To Work' award in 2024, specializing in crisis management and PR.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on December 5, 2024, Sensei Advisory, an agency under Millbrook Companies that focuses on crisis management and strategic public relations, has been honored as a 'Best Place To Work' in 2024 by PRWeek. This marks the 12th annual 'Best Places To Work' awards ceremony where Sensei Advisory was recognized for its exceptional workplace environment.

news.headline: More than 2 dozen companies launch Mercury Consortium to promote clean energy tech adoption.
news.summary: A public-private consortium called Mercury Consortium has been launched by over 25 companies in the energy sector worldwide. The initiative was introduced by Kraken and takes inspiration from Ericsson's contributions to development. The announcement was made on December 5, 2024, in Palo Alto, California, and London.

news.headline: Apex secures financing for Timbermill Wind, a 189 MW wind farm in North Carolina with help from lenders and Goldman Sachs.
news.summary: Apex Clean Energy in Charlottesville, Virginia, has revealed the financial backing for the Timbermill Wind facility, standing at 189 megawatts (MW). The construction funding was secured through a group of lenders, along with a tax equity investment from Goldman Sachs. The main contributors for the construction financing are Helaba (acting as admin agent), BNP Paribas, SMBC, and Societe Generale. Timbermill Wind, situated in Chowan County, marks North Carolina's initial wind project approval.

news.headline: Steel manufacturers in the US anticipate beginning $1 billion worth of projects in Q1 2025. Automotive and renewable energy sectors drive demand.
news.summary: Three prominent steel producers are spearheading upcoming capital investments in various locations in the United States starting in January. These projects, totaling over $1 billion, are in response to increased demand from the automotive and renewable-energy sectors. Industrial Info has identified numerous steel-manufacturing initiatives slated to commence construction in the first quarter of 2025, with the majority being revamps. Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) in Charlotte, North Carolina is among the key players in these growth ventures.

news.headline: Altus Power adds 3 solar projects in Maine, totaling 12.8 MWs, expanding its clean power portfolio in the state.
news.summary: Altus Power, a leading provider of clean electric power, has recently acquired three operational projects in Maine, increasing its presence in the state by 12.8 MWs. These projects were purchased from various developers and align with Altus Power's strategy of acquiring assets that offer immediate advantages to local communities. This acquisition marks a significant expansion in their portfolio, reinforcing their position as a key player in the clean energy sector. With this move, Altus Power continues to demonstrate its commitment to sustainable energy practices.

news.headline: New insulin delivery method aims to revolutionize healthcare; a potential game-changer in the industry.
Learn about token burning. Discover how it affects cryptocurrency supply, value, and project growth in the long term.
news.summary: Explore how token burning affects cryptocurrency scarcity, its value, and long-term growth of the project.

news.headline: Mytheresa CEO to attend ICR Conference 2025 in Orlando on Jan 13-14, 2025. Fireside chat at 11am ET on Jan 13, 2025.
news.summary: MYT Netherlands Parent B.V. (NYSE: MYTE) disclosed that CEO Michael Kliger will be at the ICR Conference 2025 in Orlando, FL. The event is scheduled for Monday, January 13, 2025, and Tuesday, January 14, 2025. Kliger will engage in a fireside chat at 11am ET on the first day and will be accessible for individual and small group discussions. Interested parties can also access a live webcast and replay of the conference.

news.headline: Brown-Forman posts Q2 net sales of $1.1 billion, down 1%, but up 3% organically. Operating income rose 1% to $341 million. Diluted earnings per share increased by 9% to $0.55.
news.summary: Brown-Forman Corporation (NYSE: BFA, BFB) released its financial outcomes for the second quarter and first half of fiscal 2025, ending on October 31, 2024. Net sales for the second quarter dropped by 1% to $1.1 billion (a 3% increase organically) compared to the prior year. In the same period, operating income rose by 1% to $341 million (up 5% organically), with diluted earnings per share climbing by 9% to $0.55. For the initial half of the fiscal year, the company reported...

news.headline: Arcadia Biosciences (RKDA) merges with Roosevelt Resources LP in all-stock deal, combining with partners in exchange for shares.
news.summary: Dallas - Arcadia Biosciences, Inc.® (Nasdaq: RKDA) and Roosevelt Resources LP have revealed their agreement to merge in an all-stock deal. As per the definitive securities exchange agreement, Arcadia will offer shares of its common stock to the partners of Roosevelt in exchange for all equity interests in Roosevelt. This transaction is set to combine the two companies, with Arcadia issuing shares of its common stock to the partners of Roosevelt upon closing. Further details of the agreement, including specific numbers, will be disclosed at the completion of the transaction.

news.headline: CyPath® Lung added to VA healthcare system, presented by bioAffinity in joint presentation with NAVREF officials.
news.summary: In San Antonio, a recent joint presentation hosted by NAVREF highlighted the collaboration between bioAffinity and Federal Supply System officials regarding the inclusion of CyPath® Lung in the VA healthcare system. This initiative aims to introduce CyPath® Lung, a groundbreaking technology, into the VA healthcare system. The collaboration signifies a significant step in enhancing healthcare services for veterans.

news.headline: Qorvo to present at Barclays 22nd Annual Global Tech Conference on Dec 12, 2024, at 12:50 p.m. ET (9:50 a.m. PT).
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on December 5, 2024, Qorvo (Nasdaq: QRVO) shared news that executives will participate in the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference on December 12, 2024. The presentation is set for 12:50 p.m. Eastern Time or 9:50 a.m. Pacific Time. Qorvo is a major global provider of connectivity and power solutions.

news.headline: Over 4% of US ecommerce transactions during Thanksgiving to Cyber Monday suspected fraudulent: TransUnion analysis.
news.summary: TransUnion has examined the rates of attempted ecommerce fraud during the holiday season. The analysis revealed that there has been a increase in fraudulent attempts on ecommerce platforms by 15% compared to the previous year. This rise indicates a concerning trend in cybercrime activity, with an estimated total of 2.5 million attempted frauds. The data suggests that consumers and businesses need to remain vigilant and take necessary precautions to protect themselves from potential fraudsters during the peak shopping period.

news.headline: Reese's Peanut Butter Cups making a comeback for 2025 Big Game ad, promising more peanut butter, chocolate, and fun with less competition.
news.summary: Reese's is making a comeback with more peanut butter, more chocolate, and more fun! After the huge success of their 2023 ad, the leading candy brand in the US is back with a bang. Stay tuned for the exciting return of Reese's to the market in 2024.

news.headline: Uniplay introduces AI-powered learning platform in Sweden, Dec. 5, 2024. Game-based LMS enhances corporate training.
news.summary: A groundbreaking development in corporate training has been introduced with the unveiling of Uniplay, the world's premier fully game-based Learning Management System (LMS). This innovative platform, based in Stockholm, Sweden, combines AI technology with interactive mobile experiences to create an engaging learning environment. Uniplay is making significant strides in changing the landscape of training by making learning enjoyable and interactive. The platform marks a significant shift in traditional LMS, offering a new approach to learning with its focus on gamification. This development comes as a key step forward in improving corporate training, and is anticipated to have a major impact on the industry.

news.headline: Theator wins at MICCAI 2024 Critical View of Safety Challenge with AI technology, setting new surgical safety standards.
news.summary: The AI technology developed by Theator has established a higher level of surgical safety, surpassing competitors in the SAGES CVS Challenge. The showcasing of their dedication to innovation and transparency took place in PALO ALTO, Calif., on Dec. 5, 2024. Theator Inc. demonstrated its leadership through this achievement, solidifying its position as a frontrunner in the field.

news.headline: MiT Systems attains AWS Consumer Good Competency for ERP solutions. Industry-leading developer for Consumer Goods.
news.summary: MiT Systems, Inc., a prominent developer of Cloud Native ERP solutions and Enterprise Mobility solutions for Consumer Goods Manufacturers and Distributors, based in Las Vegas, made a significant announcement today on Dec. 5, 2024. The company successfully reached a milestone by obtaining certification for the Amazon Web Services (AWS) Consumer Goods platform. This accreditation solidifies MiT Systems, Inc.'s position as a front-runner in the industry.

news.headline: Aon reports 75% of U.S. employers unprepared for pay transparency laws in US, Canada, and Europe.
news.summary: In major developments, the U.S., Canada, and Europe have introduced new regulations that mandate companies to enhance transparency regarding their pay practices. On December 5, 2024, Aon plc (NYSE: AON), a prominent global professional services firm, disclosed findings from its 2024 North America Pay Transparency report. This report sheds light on the current state of pay practices, highlighting a growing emphasis on transparency within the corporate world.

news.headline: Old Forester releases limited-edition 117 Series: Warehouse I - 11-year-old bourbon to celebrate 91st Repeal Day.
news.summary: Just in time for the holiday season, Louisville, Kentucky, December 5, 2024 - Today, marks the 91st Anniversary of Repeal Day as Old Forester commemorates the end of Prohibition by launching a new limited-edition bottle: Warehouse I. This unique expression is the newest addition to the 117-year-old company's lineup.

news.headline: Trumid reports November trade volume figures on electronic bond trading platform; average daily participation up 10%.
news.summary: In December 5, 2024, financial technology company Trumid revealed their November 2024 activity highlights. The fixed income electronic trading platform disclosed significant figures, including trade volume and user participation data. Trumid reported an average daily activity level in November, along with specific numbers showcasing the platform's activity and engagement within the stated timeframe.

news.headline: SWISSTECH at CES 2025 showcases 32 innovative startups, fostering technology and AI innovation. Event details in Press Release.
news.summary: Swisstech will be showcasing at CES 2025 in Hall G Level 1 Booth # 61033 at Eureka Park and in Hall D Level 2 Booth # 50435 at the Global Pavilion. The event will be held in Zurich on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: Kroger's Q3 results: Identical sales up 2.3%, Operating Profit $828M, EPS $0.84. Adjusted FIFO Operating Profit $1,017M, Adjusted EPS $0.98.
news.summary: In the third quarter, the company saw a 2.3% rise in identical sales (excluding fuel) and achieved an operating profit of $828 million with earnings per share at $0.84. Adjusted FIFO operating profit reached $1,017 million, while adjusted earnings per share were noted at $0.98. The company also generated impressive adjusted free cash flow during the quarter. By effectively executing its go-to-market strategy, the company was able to provide significant value to its customers.

news.headline: Versa earns recognition for AI, SASE, network security tech leadership with awards like 2024 Generative AI Expo Product of the Year.
news.summary: Versa, a prominent player in Universal Secure Access Service Edge (SASE) based in Santa Clara, California, has recently garnered recognition in various industry awards for its excellence in AI, cybersecurity, and network security technologies. Noteworthy acknowledgments received by Versa include the 2024 Generative AI Expo Product of the Year Award from TMC, a worldwide media entity. This prestigious accolade was bestowed upon VersaAI, highlighting its innovation and leadership in the field. Such achievements underscore Versa's commitment to advancing cutting-edge solutions and further establishing its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Toast and Uber expand partnership to offer commission-free delivery, helping restaurants reduce costs and reach more diners.
news.summary: An expanded partnership between Toast and Uber has been announced in Boston and San Francisco. This collaboration aims to assist restaurants in lowering expenses and accessing a larger customer base through commission-free delivery services. This move is expected to benefit numerous restaurants in both cities by cutting costs and increasing outreach to customers.

news.headline: Travel + Leisure Co. enhances vacation ownership CX with NICE CXone Mpower, migrating 14 lines of business for improved customer experience.
news.summary: In Hoboken, New Jersey, NICE (Nasdaq: NICE) revealed that Travel + Leisure Co., a worldwide vacation ownership and travel membership company, has effectively transitioned numerous business operations to the advanced NICE CXone Mpower platform. This move marks a significant shift for the company as it completed a multi-vendor displacement to enhance customer experience standards. With the implementation of CXone Mpower, Travel + Leisure Co. aimed to improve agent efficiency and consolidate information silos across fourteen business lines globally.

news.headline: Splunk Inc. to host GovSummit 2024 in Washington D.C. on Dec 11, 2024, for govt IT professionals for insights on digital resilience.
news.summary: Splunk Inc., a prominent cybersecurity and observability company, is set to organize GovSummit 2024 in Washington, D.C. later this month. The event aims to convene government IT and security personnel, providing them with valuable insights from industry specialists on fortifying digital resilience to accomplish mission objectives. GovSummit 2024 is scheduled for Wednesday, December 11, 2024, from 7:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. ET at the Ronald Reagan Building and International Trade Center in Washington, D.C.

news.headline: PublicSquare congratulates board member Kelly Loeffler on her nomination as Administrator of the SBA. CEO Seifert is thrilled.
news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc., known as PublicSquare and listed on NYSE as PSQH, celebrated the nomination of board member Kelly Loeffler to the position of Administrator of the Small Business Administration (SBA). PublicSquare, focusing on commerce and payments, values life, family, and liberty. Michael Seifert, the Chairman & CEO, expressed excitement that President Trump selected Loeffler for this role.

news.headline: Axios HQ acquires Mixing Board to enhance internal comms, catering to top organizations, in software, training, and editorial.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, Axios HQ, a prominent internal communication solution utilizing Smart Brevity® and AI, has completed the acquisition of Mixing Board, a network comprising the country's leading communication, branding, and marketing professionals aiming to drive progress in their fields. In the past four years, Axios HQ has developed premier offerings - encompassing software, training, and editorial services - tailored for numerous global organizations seeking to amplify their communication efficacy. Mixing Board Inc. has established a significant reputation within the industry during this period.

news.headline: Docebo wins 2024 AWS Rising Star Tech Partner of the Year in Italy for growth, innovation, and customer impact. #DCBO #DCBO
news.summary: In Italy, Docebo Inc., a leading provider of AI-powered learning solutions, has been named the AWS Rising Star Technology Italian Partner of the Year for 2024. The company, listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol DCBO and on the TSX, was recognized for its exceptional growth, innovation, and customer influence utilizing AWS technologies. Presented by Amazon Web Services, the award showcases Docebo's significance within the AWS Partner Network.

news.headline: FIS celebrates latest cohort at 2024 Innovation Day, highlighting 9 fintech companies advancing money lifecycle tech.
news.summary: Financial technology leader FIS® (NYSE: FIS) in Jacksonville, Fla., revealed the latest cohort for the 2024 FIS Fintech Accelerator Innovation Day. Nine growth-stage fintech companies displayed their technology at FIS’ Innovation Center on November 13. The event attracted partners and banking clients, highlighting solutions that streamline the money lifecycle. The cohort consists of nine innovative companies.

news.headline: Wiley (NYSE: WLY) reports Q2 2025 results: Learning revenue up high single digit, Research revenue up low single digit.
news.summary: Wiley, a prominent publisher (NYSE: WLY), recently disclosed its performance for the second quarter concluding on October 31, 2024. The quarter showcased notable achievements including noteworthy revenue growth in Learning, reaching high single digits, driven by advantageous market circumstances and AI licensing. Additionally, Research observed a modest increase in revenue, in the low single digits, due to strong publishing demand and a slight enhancement in Research Solutions. These developments helped counterbalance a substantial year-over-year fluctuation in legacy print.

news.headline: Sojo Industries partners with Molex to enhance its Sojo Seal™ tracking device for consumer-packaged goods, improving supply chain transparency.
news.summary: In Bristol, Pennsylvania, Sojo Industries, a key player in smart supply chain solutions, has revealed a new partnership with Molex, a prominent global electronics company and innovation leader in connectivity. This collaboration aims to boost production of Sojo Industries' unique Sojo Seal™, an advanced tracking device for consumer-packaged goods that operates on a network and currently holds a patent pending status. This move represents a major stride in advancing transparency within supply chains, offering an innovative solution to enhance the tracking and monitoring of goods.

news.headline: Leandra Fishman has been named Chief Revenue Officer at Proof (fka Notarize), previously worked at Apollo.io, Intercom, Twilio, SendGrid.
news.summary: Leandra Fishman has recently been named Chief Revenue Officer at Proof (formerly known as Notarize), based in Boston. With previous experience at Apollo.io, Intercom, Twilio, and SendGrid, she brings a wealth of knowledge to her new role.

news.headline: FreeWheel launches Contextual Marketplace based on Viewer Experience Lab research findings revealing 2X viewer engagement with relevant ads.
news.summary: Today, FreeWheel unveiled its innovative Contextual Marketplace for the television advertising sector, allowing publishers to utilize detailed contextual classification data in streaming inventory. This empowers advertisers to target their media purchases using advanced video-level insights. The addition of KERV.ai, a prominent video analysis and monetization company, to the Contextual Marketplace, along with Proximic by Comscore, further enhances this offering.

news.headline: Surf Air Mobility receives 4 Cessna Grand Caravan EX aircraft from Textron Aviation, part of a larger fleet order.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. has received four Cessna Grand Caravan EX turboprop aircraft from Textron Aviation. This delivery marks the first of Surf Air's fleet order, with two of the aircraft being financed through operating leases with ITC-AeroLeasing, Inc. Surf Air (NYSE: SRFM) is a prominent regional air mobility platform, strengthening its fleet with these new aircraft. This acquisition demonstrates Surf Air's commitment to expanding its operations and enhancing its services.

news.headline: Redfin's Homebuyer Demand Index near record high, up 7% YoY, mortgage-purchase applications up 17% MoM.
news.summary: In Seattle, the Homebuyer Demand Index of Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN) is currently close to its peak since September 2023, as indicated by the latest report from the real estate brokerage. The Index, which is a adjusted metric for tours and purchasing services provided by Redfin agents, has seen a 7% increase compared to the previous year. Mortgage-purchase applications have surged by 17% monthly, reaching the highest point since late January. Furthermore, pending home sales have also shown significant growth, with a 6.5% increase.

news.headline: WEX partners with Qmerit for EV charger installation for commercial fleets, utilizing 23,000 electricians nationwide.
news.summary: WEX, a global commerce platform (NYSE: WEX), has formed a partnership with EV charger installation provider Qmerit to facilitate the installation of EV chargers for commercial fleet drivers across the nation. Through this collaboration, Qmerit will offer comprehensive home EV charging installation and integration services leveraging its network of over 23,000 licensed electricians. This partnership aims to streamline the process of installing EV chargers at the homes of commercial fleet drivers, enhancing accessibility to charging infrastructure.

news.headline: Cartography Biosciences appoints 4 new members to its Clinical Advisory Board including industry expert Kristen Hege.
news.summary: In South San Francisco, California, Cartography Biosciences, Inc. has added four new members to its Clinical Advisory Board (CAB) as they focus on developing antibody therapeutics for targeted tumor treatment. The appointees are Kristen Hege M.D., former SVP at Bristol-Myers Squibb, specializing in Early Clinical Development, Hematology/Oncology & Cell Therapy; Bridget Keenan M.D., Ph.D., an Assistant Professor at the University of California.
